articles.author: Abid Iqbal Shaik
articles.title: One UI 8.5 beta update now rolling out to the Galaxy Z Fold 7 - SamMobile
articles.description: After months of leaks and speculations, Samsung has finally opened the One UI 8.5 beta program for the Galaxy Z Fold 7. At the moment, the company has released the update in India and South Korea. Earlier today, it also released the seventh One UI 8.5 beta up…
